{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Yoma
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Locals call the mountain [[Yoma]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
